query: DELETE FROM metas WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); DELETE FROM conversion_stats WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); DELETE FROM fila_distribuicao WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); DELETE FROM atividades_diarias WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); DELETE FROM metas_diarias WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste');
